title: MCP loopback owner context is derived from the spoofable x-openclaw-sender-is-owner request header
description: In src/gateway/mcp-http.request.ts, resolveMcpRequestContext() builds the MCP request context (used for owner-gated operations) by reading senderIsOwner directly from the client-supplied x-openclaw-sender-is-owner HTTP header via getHeader(req, ...). Loopback authentication used only a single shared bearer token that conveyed no owner/non-owner distinction, so any authenticated loopback client could set this header to "true" and be treated as the owner for owner-gated MCP operations.
